title: Applying to Voluntarily Renounce Permanent Resident Status - Canada.ca
content:
## Applying to Voluntarily Renounce Permanent Resident Status
Get help to open an application form or to fill one out in the Help Centre .
This application is for persons who would like to renounce their permanent resident status.
This application includes:
- Document Checklist (IMM 5783) (opens in a new tab)
- Application to Voluntarily Renounce Permanent Resident Status  (IMM 5782) (opens in a new tab)
- Use of Representative (IMM 5476) (opens in a new tab)
- Application guide (IMM 5781)
- Solemn declaration concerning a lost, stolen, destroyed or never received Permanent Resident Card (IMM 5451) (opens in a new tab)

## How to use this application package
- Read your instruction guide and download your application forms.
- Complete, sign and date your application form.
- Mail your fully completed application.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
